block_00: What is new on the stock market?
block_01: As more people get vaccinated, it seems, the U.S economy is on the road to recovery. How does that translate to the stock market? What is the situation on Forex and what is the future of Bitcoin?
block_02: This week we look into these hot topics and try to answer all the questions, while considering technical analysis factors as well.
block_03: If you wish to refresh the month of March in your mind and prepare for an eventful April, read on!
block_04: *past performance is not an indicator of future performance
